description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by dense coniferous trees, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a blue door, large windows, and a paved driveway leading to a detached garage with a car parked inside. The property is landscaped with a row of small shrubs along the front and a wooden deck or patio area visible at the rear, partially shaded by mature trees. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or white material, contrasting with the darker roof and natural wood accents. The garage is a separate structure, matching the main building's style and color palette. The overall setting suggests a private, suburban or semi-rural location with significant greenery and privacy.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a detached garage, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped with shrubs and a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue door, large windows, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped shrubs.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the dense tree coverage, wooden deck, and partial view of the garage and house roof.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by trees, with glimpses of the wooden deck and back of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, driveway, side of the house, and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
